description: Led the tech stack modernization with Headless CMS + Next.js 14, built a complete Design System from scratch, and redesigned strategic pages focusing on conversion and UX.
Developed CloudX, an enterprise cloud governance platform (AWS, GCP, Azure) used by thousands of J&J employees worldwide, built with React, Redux, Material-UI, and GraphQL.
Led a large-scale migration from legacy Class Components to modern React Hooks, and created a new Design System ensuring consistency across the entire application.
Delivered institutional websites and landing pages end-to-end (design to deploy). Built web systems with Python (Flask/Django) and introduced React and Angular for advanced UI management.
